# REQ-SYS-049: Reminder shall suppress after 30 s of continuous driving

## ASIL Level
QM

## Description
Reminder shall suppress after 30 s of continuous driving.

## Rationale
ISO 26262-3:2018, clause 5-5.4.2 — safety goal SG-RE-01 requires timely functional safety response.

## Verification Method
Back-to-back test comparing sensor input vs. actuator output.

## Traceability
- Up: None
- Down: None
